title: heuffelia pratensis
intro: Heuffelia pratensis, also known as Heuffel's golden ragwort or Heuffel's ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Heuffelia pratensis is said to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer medicinal relief.
